pages.title: User Funnel | User Engagement
pages.key_finding: In April, the player base reached a critical low with only 4 Monthly Active Users. This causes an extreme anomaly in User Stickiness (jumping to 57.5%), which is purely a statistical artifact of the near-zero denominator. Despite 669 total clicks and an 87.1% registration rate, the persistent 55.7% pre-gameplay drop-off means the game is fundamentally failing to convert interest into actual play.

pages.title: Game Performance (Score)
pages.key_finding: With the user base severely depleted, the average daily score hit a floor of 4,398 in April, representing a further 64.1% decline from March's 12,265. The competitive ecosystem of the game is essentially dormant.

pages.title: Game Performance (Time)
pages.key_finding: Daily playtime plummeted to under 5 minutes per day, a 66.7% drop from the previous month. The remaining few players are merely logging in and immediately out, emphasizing that current retention mechanics are entirely ineffective.
